title: Asteroid Rig: Causal Map of Subsystem Telemetry
isolation: candidate runs as an isolated stdin->stdout subprocess via isorun; the ground-truth DAG, topological order, structural weights, latent variables and hidden state stay in the evaluator process
strategies: predict the empty causal map (SHD = number of true edges = the evaluator baseline -> ~0.1 on every rig)
marginal mutual-information thresholding with column-order orientation: catches real direct links but drowns in indirect/transitive false positives and coin-flip orientations
PC-style conditional-independence skeleton (order-0/1/2 MI screening removes transitive edges; collider co-parents were never linked) + ascending-marginal-entropy topological ordering to orient links
score-based or higher-order constraint-based discovery (deeper CI conditioning, GES, or an equal-disturbance ordering search) that models each rig to push SHD lower still across the held-out battery
